notes: rule.core.voice-register spans one deterministic LINT.* code (LINT.FINANCIAL, executed live) and three LLM-judged FM.* codes (prose, structural-only in CI). FM.LANE_DRIFT is HARD and routes back to the matcher; FM.POSTER_REGISTER / FM.SUBSTITUTABLE are SOFT/warn and bar the Recommended slot.

cases.name: financial
cases.notes: Floor-price / market-cap talk in a non-financial brand voice — deterministic, hard.

cases.name: poster-register
cases.notes: Closing line reads as a motivational-poster maxim, not grounded operator-conviction.

cases.name: substitutable
cases.notes: Generic enough that an unrelated brand could post it verbatim — no brand-specific anchor.

cases.name: lane-drift
cases.notes: Off-lane generic category copy with no operator override — HARD, routes to the matcher.

cases.name: on-voice
cases.notes: Clean control: on-lane, non-substitutable, grounded conviction, no financial register.
